text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating your vegetables. Balanced diet means including fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and proteins while limiting processed foods and sugar. Of course, regular exercise is important too—activities like walking, cycling, or swimming for at least 30 minutes a day can boost your energy. Sleep is equally crucial; most adults need seven to nine hours each night to feel rested. But don’t forget mental health. Stress can harm your body, so it’s vital to practice relaxation, such as meditation or hobbies you enjoy. Finally, aim for work-life balance. Set boundaries between work and personal time, and make space for friends, family, and fun. These habits together build a strong, healthy life.
